name: Brownie Peanut Butter Bites
recipeIngredient: 48 miniature chocolate covered peanut butter cups
recipeInstructions:
1 Preheat oven to 350 degrees F (175 degrees C).
2 In a large bowl, combine the brownie mix, water, oil, and egg. Stir until well mixed.
3 Carefully fill each paper-lined mini muffin cup about halfway with the batter.
4 Gently press one peanut butter cup into the batter in each cup.
5 Bake for 15-20 minutes or until the brownies are set. Remove from oven and allow to cool completely.
Yield: 40-48 pieces.
